coverageTagDefinitions.action-failure: Scenario expects Rust-owned action failure telemetry.
coverageTagDefinitions.action-trigger: Scenario covers Rust-owned action trigger producers or consumers.
coverageTagDefinitions.authored-behavior: Scenario installs gameplay authoring data instead of relying only on built-in config.
coverageTagDefinitions.baseline: Scenario covers the default Top-down Shooter baseline.
coverageTagDefinitions.collision-damage: Scenario covers authored or default collision damage outcomes.
coverageTagDefinitions.enemy-target: Scenario covers actions targeting enemy entities.
coverageTagDefinitions.faction: Scenario covers gameplay faction damage-mask policy or denial telemetry.
coverageTagDefinitions.game-over: Scenario reaches or verifies GameOver state.
coverageTagDefinitions.player-damage: Scenario covers damage applied to the player.
coverageTagDefinitions.projectile: Scenario covers projectile action or projectile collision behavior.
coverageTagDefinitions.spawn-diagnostics: Scenario asserts deferred spawn telemetry metrics.
coverageTagDefinitions.state-enter: Scenario covers FSM state-enter action trigger behavior.
coverageTagDefinitions.target-player: Scenario covers non-player actions targeting the live player.
coverageTagDefinitions.tile-impact: Scenario covers blocking tile impact gameplay event telemetry.
coverageTagDefinitions.timer: Scenario covers gameplay timer events or timer-triggered actions.
coverageTagDefinitions.unsupported-aim: Scenario covers unsupported aim source failure.
coverageTagDefinitions.unsupported-collision-target: Scenario covers unsupported collision target failure.
coverageTagDefinitions.variant: Scenario is linked to an authored behavior variant file.

scenario-source.description: How the replay scenario is sourced or authored.

gameplay-events.description: Gameplay state, collision, and event telemetry observed by replay.

actions.description: Action producers, action consumers, and target policies covered by replay.

diagnostics.description: Agent-facing failure and diagnostic report coverage.

sequencing.description: Behavior sequencing and state machine coverage.
